markdown:
#  Which data columns can I add to a custom Submittals report? 
##  Answer 
When creating or editing a custom report that includes data from the Project level Submittals tool (see [Create a Custom Submittals Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-custom-submittals-report) or [Edit a Custom Submittal Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/edit-a-custom-submittal-report)), you can add the following data columns:
  * Accounts Payable
  * Actual Delivery Date
  * Anticipated Delivery Date
  * Approvers
  * Approvers Due Date
  * Architect
  * Ball In Court
  * Ball In Court Due Date
  * Confirmed Delivery Date
  * Cost Code
  * Created By
  * Created On
  * Days Overdue
  * Description
  * Design Team Review Time
  * Distributed Date
  * Final Due Date
  * IFT Creator/Programmer
  * Internal Review Time
  * Issue Date
  * Lead Time
  * Location
  * Number
  * Overdue
  * Package Name
  * Package Number
  * Planned Internal Review Completed Date
  * Planned Return Date
  * Planned Submit By Date
  * Project Address
  * Project Bid Type
  * Project City
  * Project Country
  * Project Date Created
  * Project Department
  * Project Description
  * Project Designated Market Area
  * Project Estimated Completion Date
  * Project Estimated Start Date
  * Project Estimated Value
  * Project Manager
  * Project Name
  * Project Notes
  * Project Number
  * Project Office Name
  * Project Owner Type
  * Project Parent Job
  * Project Phone
  * Project Program
  * Project Region
  * Project Square Feet
  * Project Stage
  * Project State
  * Project Type
  * Project ZIP
  * Received Date
  * Received From
  * Required on-Site Date
  * Response
  * Responsible Contractor
  * Returned Date
  * Revision
  * Scheduled Task ID
  * Sent Date
  * Spec Section Description
  * Spec Section Number
  * Status
  * Submit By
  * Submittals Manager
  * Submittals ID
  * Superintendent
  * Title
  * Type

title: Which data columns can I add to a custom Submittals report?
